no_data.title: Whakahaere i ō īmēra tono
no_data.description: Whakahohea ngā tauira īmēra ki te tīmata i te tuku īmēra āwhina ki ngā kiritaki.

banner.title: He whakapau kōrero ākonga te hunga whakamātau!
banner.content: Ka whai whakapau kōrero ākonga i ngā momo īmēra me ngā tauira īmēra i roto i ā mātou whakapau kōrero īmēra whakamahere me ngā tauira hei whakapau kōrero ākonga.

campaign.email_content_description: Whakarite i te kaupapa īmēra me te reo whakararuraru hei whakamārama i te whakaaro ki ngā kiritaki
campaign.title: Rere īmēra
campaign.enter_email_address: Whakauru i te wāhitau īmēra i raro nei
campaign.email_scheduling: Whakarite i te wā īmēra ka tukuna ki ngā kiritaki e haere mai ana i ngā rohe whenua rerekē
campaign.subject: Kaupapa
campaign.active_require_toast: Me whakatinana koe i te tono whakamātau
campaign.call_to_action_btn: Pātene karanga ki te mahi (Tuhia he arotake)

request_review.title: Tono Arotake
request_review.content: I muri i te {{day}} rā me te {{status}}, ka tukuna aunoa he īmēra ki te kiritaki hei tono i a rātou ki te tuku arotake mō te hua.

request_review_reminder.title: Whakamaumahara Arotake
request_review_reminder.content: I muri i te {{days}} rā mai i te tuku īmēra tono arotake tuatahi, ka tukuna aunoa he īmēra whakamaumahara mēnā kāore he whakautu i riro. Ka whakahohea anake mēnā kei te noho te tono arotake.
request_review_reminder.after_review_request_mail: i muri i te tono arotake

thank_you_for_review.title: Ngā Mihi mō tō Arotake
thank_you_for_review.content: I muri i te tuku arotake a te kiritaki, ka tukuna aunoa he īmēra whakawhetai. Ka taea te tāpiri waehere utu me ngā tuku. Ka whakahohea anake mēnā kei te noho te tono arotake.
thank_you_for_review.content_2: I muri i te {{days}} rā i te tuku arotake, ka tukuna aunoa he īmēra whakawhetai. Ka taea te tāpiri waehere utu me ngā tuku. Ka whakahohea anake mēnā kei te noho te tono arotake.

campaign.send_test_success: I tukuna te īmēra i te whakamātau
campaign.send_test_hepltext: Whakauru i te wāhitau īmēra i raro nei
campaign.add_country_timing: Tāpiri i te wā o te whenua
campaign.no_language_found: Kāore i kitea he reo e tautuhi ana:
campaign.discount_description: Whakamanahia ngā kiritaki ki te waiho i tētahi arotake mā te tuku whakahekenga mō tō rātou hoko e whai ake nei
campaign.email_queue_description: Tukua ngā īmēra tono mō ngā ota kāore i tukuna aunoa

request_review.subject: Kei te hari te hoko i te {{PRODUCT_NAME}}? Whakakaha i tēnei wā!
request_review.preview_text: Mihi ana mātou ki a koe mō tō hoko whakamutunga. Tūmanako ana mātou ka whiwhi koe i te aroha! Ki te whiwhi koe, ka whai whakapau kōrero tino whai mana ki a mātou

body.title: He aha te whaiaro o tō whakamātautau? 🤗
body.html: He aha te whaiaro o tō whakamātautau? 🤗

content.html:
Kia ora {{FIRST_NAME}}

He hiahia mātou ki te whakarongo me te kite i te whakamātau o tō whakararuraru i te hoko i te {{STORE_NAME}}

Ki te whai i te wā, ka pai ki te whakapau kōrero i ō whakaaro me ō wheako me mātou me ngā kaihoko. Ko tō whakaaetanga te mea whakapau kōrero whai mana 🤩.

request_review.subject: Kei te hari te hoko i te {{PRODUCT_NAME}}? Whakakaha i tēnei wā!
request_review.content:
Kia ora {{FIRST_NAME}}

Kei te hiahia mātou ki te whakarongo me te kite i te whakamātau o tō whakararuraru i te hoko i te {{STORE_NAME}}

Ki te whai i te wā, ka pai ki te whakapau kōrero i ō whakaaro me ō wheako me mātou me ngā kaihoko. Ko tō whakaaetanga te mea whakapau kōrero whai mana 🤩.

Ngā mihi,

Te Whānau o {{STORE_NAME}}

request_review_reminder.subject: He aha te whaiaro o tō whakamātautau? Kia whakamōhio mai.
request_review_reminder.content: Ngā mihi mō tō hoko whakamutunga. Tūmanako ana mātou ka whiwhi koe i te aroha! Ki te whiwhi koe, ka whai whakapau kōrero tino whai mana ki a mātou

thank_you_email.subject: Mihi ki a koe mō te whakamātau!❤️
thank_you_email.content:
Kia ora {{FIRST_NAME}}

Kia ora, he mihi ki a koe mō te whakamātau whakamutunga. E whakapau kōrero ana mātou ki te whakarongo me te whakamihi i te wā i whakapau kōrero koe mō tēnei whakaputanga.

request_review.subject: He Whaiwhakaaro Nui: Whakapuaki ō Whakaaro mō {{PRODUCT_NAME}}
request_review.content:
Tēnā koe {{FIRST_NAME}}

Ko te tino whiwhi i tō hoko whakamutunga o {{PRODUCT_NAME}} mai i {{STORE_NAME}}. He whaiwhakaaro nui tō whakapuaki hei āwhina i a mātou ki te whakapai i ā mātou whakarato me te whakapau kōrero pai rawa atu mō ngā kiritaki katoa.

Ko te karanga aroha tēnei ki a koe ki te whakapuaki ō whakaaro mō {{PRODUCT_NAME}} mā te whakakore i tētahi whakamātautau i runga i ā mātou paetukutuku. Ka whakaae whakapau kōrero tō whakaaro tika.

Ngā mihi mō tō wā me tō tautoko tonu.

Nā,

Te Whānau o {{STORE_NAME}}

request_review_reminder.subject: Tō Wheako Whakamutunga me {{STORE_NAME}}
request_review_reminder.content:
Kia ora {{FIRST_NAME}}

Ngā mihi mō tō whakarite i te hoko whakamutunga i {{STORE_NAME}}! Tino whaiwhakaaro ana mātou ki tō wheako whakamutunga, ā, ka whakaae mātou ki te whiwhi i ō whakaaro.

Ngā mihi nui,

{{STORE_NAME}}

thank_you_email.subject: Whakaputanga Whakamātau: He Whaiwhakaaro Nui!
thank_you_email.content:
Tēnā koe {{FIRST_NAME}}

Ngā mihi ki a koe mō te whakapuaki i tō whakaaro mō tō hoko whakamutunga. He whaiwhakaaro nui tō whakapuaki ki a mātou i ā mātou whakarato me ā mātou ratonga. Ka whakaae mātou ki te whakapuaki i ō whakaaro.

request_review.subject: Whakatūwhera Ngā Painga Whakamātau! Whakapuaki ō Whakaaro mō {{PRODUCT_NAME}}
request_review.content:
Kia ora {{FIRST_NAME}}

E whai ana koe i tō {{PRODUCT_NAME}} hōu mai i {{STORE_NAME}}? He aroha ki te whakarongo ki āu whakaaro!

Ko te whakapuaki ō whakaaro tika i runga i ā mātou paetukutuku e āwhina ana i ētahi atu ki te whakarite i ngā whakatau whakamātau me te whakatūwhera i ngā painga whakamātau whakamutunga mōu, arā, he kuponu motuhake mō tō hoko whakamutunga kei te haere mai!

He wāhi noa iho e whiwhi ana i ētahi hēkona ki te whakapuaki ō whakaaro, ā, ka whakarerekē i te āhua.

Pāwhiritia ngā whetū me whakapuaki ō whakaaro i tēnei rā!

Ngā mihi,

Te Whānau o {{STORE_NAME}}

request_review_reminder.subject: Whakatūwhera Ngā Painga Motuhake me tō Whakaaro!
request_review_reminder.content:
Kia ora {{FIRST_NAME}},

Ko tō hoko whakamutunga mai i {{STORE_NAME}} he mea nui ki a mātou! Whakapuaki ō whakaaro, whakatūwhera ngā painga motuhake, ā, whakarauora i tētahi mea motuhake mōu anō.

Ngā mihi mō tō whiriwhiri i {{STORE_NAME}}!

Ngā mihi aroha,

{{STORE_NAME}}

thank_you_email.subject: Āwhina i ētahi atu ki te Hoko Mārama: Whakapuaki ō Wheako Whakamātau!
thank_you_email.content:
Kia ora {{FIRST_NAME}},

Ngā mihi ki a koe mō te whakapuaki i tō whakaaro mō tō hoko whakamutunga! He mea nui āu whakaaro ki ētahi atu kaihoko, ā, he whakamihi nui ki a koe mō te whakapau kōrero ki tō tātou hapori. Mā te whakapuaki i tō wheako e āwhina i ētahi atu ki te whiriwhiri i ngā whakatau whakamātau.

request_review.subject: Kei te Āwhina Mātou! Whakapuaki ō Wheako me {{PRODUCT_NAME}}
request_review.content:
Kia ora {{FIRST_NAME}}

Ko te tino whiwhi i tō {{PRODUCT_NAME}} hōu mai i {{STORE_NAME}}.

Ko tō whakapuaki i runga i ā mātou paetukutuku e āwhina ana i ētahi atu, ā, e āwhina ana i a mātou ki te whakarite i te tautoko pai rawa atu mō ā mātou kiritaki.

Whakapuaki āu whakaaro mō {{PRODUCT_NAME}}, he pai, he kino rānei. He whaiwhakaaro nui tō whakapuaki, ā, he hiahia kia whiwhi koe i te whakapau kōrero.

Ki te whai koe i ētahi pātai, ki te hiahia koe i te āwhina ki tō {{PRODUCT_NAME}}, tēnā whakapā atu ki ā mātou rōpū tautoko kiritaki āwhina.

Ko te whakapau kōrero pai tō mātou!

Ngā mihi aroha,

Te Whānau o {{STORE_NAME}}

request_review_reminder.subject: He Whaiwhakaaro Nui ki a {{STORE_NAME}}
request_review_reminder.content:
Tēnā koe {{FIRST_NAME}},

Ko te tino whiwhi i tō hoko whakamutunga mai i {{STORE_NAME}}. He whaiwhakaaro nui tō whakapuaki. Tēnā whakapau kōrero i āu whakaaro.

Ngā mihi ki a koe i tō whiriwhiri i {{STORE_NAME}}.

Ngā mihi nui,

{{STORE_NAME}}

thank_you_email.subject: Kua kite mātou i tō Whakapuaki!
thank_you_email.content:
Kia ora {{FIRST_NAME}},

Kua kite mātou i tō whakapuaki mō tō hoko whakamutunga, ā, he whakamihi nui ki a koe! He whaiwhakaaro nui tō whakapuaki ki a mātou, ā, he āwhina nui ki a mātou ki te whakarite i te tino whaiwhakaaro mō ngā kiritaki katoa.

qr_code_setting.store_qr_code_description: Waihangatia me te whakarite i ngā waehere QR ahurei mō tō toa, kia taea ai e ngā kiritaki te whakahaere me te arotake i ā rātou ota mā te mātaki noa. Whakanuia te wheako kiritaki o tō toa mā te whakauru tere me te waehere QR.

resync-helptext: Ka tārua anō te pūnaha i ō ota o mua.
